name: Chicken Mushroom Pasta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds fryer, whole or cut up
1 pound mushrooms (fresh) or 2 cans mushrooms (4 ounces each), sliced and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fryer in the crock pot with celery, onions, and salt.
2. Combine chicken broth with tomato paste and pour over the ingredients in the crock pot.
3. Add sherry, dried oregano, and mushrooms; stir to moisten all ingredients.
4. Cover and cook on low setting for 8-10 hours (on high setting for 3 1/2 to 5 hours).
5. Remove chicken; bone the meat and dice it. Return the meat to the crock pot.
6. Knead butter and flour together, then add with cream; stir well.
7. Cover and cook on high setting for 30 minutes to 1 1/2 hours (on low setting for 3 to 5 hours).
